author: ESPN YouTube
text:
🚨Live from NBA FINALS Game 2: Knicks take Game 1, can the Spurs respond?! 🏀 👀 | Hoop Streams
The 2026 NBA Finals roll on as the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs meet in a pivotal Game 2 with the series hanging in the balance. On this edition of Hoop Streams, Vanessa Richardson, Iman Shumpert, Kendrick Perkins, and Vince Goodwill recap Game 1 and break down Brunson's historic Finals debut, Karl-Anthony Towns' defensive impact on Wembanyama, and the adjustments San Antonio must make to avoid falling into a dangerous 0-2 hole. We also discuss the spurs struggles and which team faces the most pressure entering tonight's matchup. Plus, Jose Alvarado joins the show, the Salesian Sisters return after becoming playoff sensations, and we react to the biggest social media moments from Game 1. Can the Spurs bounce back on their home floor, or will the Knicks head to New York with complete control of the Finals?

✔️ Subscribe to ESPN Unlimited: https://plus.espn.com/
